SANDOR CERTIFICATION
Week 2, Video 1: Assets
www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 6 --

Something I Forgot To Mention Last Week
• 	Remember who one of our rules is always be TARGET driven and DEADLINE driven?
• 	Aside from the obvious reasons (like …you can’t hit a target if you don’t know what it is),
there’s another VERY important reason …
• 	FEE MINIMIZATION.
• 	In last week’s example, our target was to create systems to go from $100K per month to
$150K per month.
• 	If we succeed, that’s an extra $600K per year.
• 	If we ONLY make an extra $50K in revenue but it doesn’t continue, that’s still $50K.
• 	If you charge significantly LESS than that for that result, it’s a NO BRAINER.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 6 --

Stated Objective 	Assets 	Numbers
Diagnosis 	One-Step 	Review & Repeat
www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 6 --

Now Let’s Talk About Assets
• 	This is not about financial assets.
• All we’re looking to do is list every imaginable thing we’ve got at our
disposal to work with so we can hit our target.
• It’s VERY RARE for a client to fully realize the power of all the assets they
have at their disposal.
• Once you get all the assets out in the open, you’ll often get a strong idea of
how to hit the target.
• Getting the numbers and doing the diagnosis usually just validates the idea.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 6 --

The Asset Checklist Tool
• There are three main categories of assets we can use.
• HUMAN: Customer lists, Audiences, Joint Venture Relationships, Staff,
Etc.
• TRANSACTIONAL: Traffic, Sales Processes, Funnels, Campaigns, Ads,
Etc.
• SELLABLE: Products and services (existing or create-able.)
• Clients usually don’t realize how much they’ve got so it’s up to us to drag
it out of them.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 6 --

Every product that is sellable.
Every service that is sellable.
Every product that is create-able.
Every product that is create-able.
What was your biggest month
of the past 12 months?
What was your second biggest month
of the past 12 months?
What was your third biggest month
of the past 12 months?
What’s the per-product revenue
breakdown for the biggest month?
What’s the per-product revenue
breakdown for the second biggest month?
What’s the per-product revenue
breakdown for the third biggest month?
What’s the ads and promos ran during the biggest month?
What’s the ads and promos ran during the second
biggest month?
What’s the ads and promos ran during the third
biggest month?
